name: i3 Verticals, Inc.
business: i3 Verticals provides mission-critical enterprise software solutions to public sector entities, including state and local governments, with cloud-native solutions for courts, public safety, public administration, utilities, transportation, and schools. The company also offers a proprietary payment facilitator platform integrated into its software.
sellsTo: Public sector entities (state, county, local government)

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary payment facilitator platform seamlessly integrates into our software solutions, unlocking additional value.
We have centralized cybersecurity measures using fully integrated Microsoft tools, including endpoint detection and response, mobile device management, and identity and access management solutions.

We have been endeavoring to thoughtfully incorporate AI capabilities into our platforms and workflows-enhancing automation, decision-making, and customer experience without adding unnecessary complexity.
